briefs.title: WorkSafeBC dollar amounts adjusted upward under Workers Compensation Act, effective January 1, 2026
briefs.summary: WorkSafeBC has updated the dollar amounts set out in the Workers Compensation Act, effective January 1, 2026. These figures — which affect things like wage-loss benefits and assessments — are adjusted annually to keep pace with inflation.
briefs.action_required: Review the updated WorkSafeBC dollar amounts to confirm your payroll assessments and coverage are correct for 2026.

key_dates.label: WorkSafeBC adjusted dollar amounts under Workers Compensation Act take effect

briefs.industries: Labour & Employment, Construction & Development, Professional Services
